title: regelia innocentii
intro: Regelia innocentii, also known as Firewheel or Wild Lantana, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the lymphatic system and support the immune system due to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. Consuming Regelia innocentii has been associated with several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Regelia innocentii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
